;;;802        }
;;;803    
;;;804        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x02;

;;;805        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x02;

;;;806        BulkLen = 2;
000012  4e15              LDR      r6,|L1.104|
;;;807        BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
000014  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000016  6334              STR      r4,[r6,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000018  7030              STRB     r0,[r6,#0]
;;;808    
;;;809        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 2 bytes we have
;;;810           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;811        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {

00001c  4605              MOV      r5,r0

;;;812            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;

;;;813            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;

                  |L1.56|
;;;814        }
;;;815    
;;;816        USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, BulkLen);

000042  4908              LDR      r1,|L1.100|
000044  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
000048  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;817        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
00004e  6b31              LDR      r1,[r6,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000050  1a40              SUBS     r0,r0,r1
000052  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000054  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;818        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;

00005a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00005c  3908              SUBS     r1,r1,#8

                  USBD_MSC_BulkIn PROC
;;;1022   
;;;1023   void USBD_MSC_BulkIn(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1024   {
;;;1025       switch (BulkStage) {
000002  4910              LDR      r1,|L2.68|
000004  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]  ; BulkStage
000006  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000008  d008              BEQ      |L2.28|
00000a  2803              CMP      r0,#3
00000c  d00f              BEQ      |L2.46|
00000e  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000010  d010              BEQ      |L2.52|
000012  2805              CMP      r0,#5
000014  d101              BNE      |L2.26|
;;;1026           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN:
;;;1027               switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;1028                   case SCSI_READ10:
;;;1029                   case SCSI_READ12:
;;;1030                       USBD_MSC_MemoryRead();
;;;1031                       break;
;;;1032               }
;;;1033   
;;;1034               break;
;;;1035   
;;;1036           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST:
;;;1037               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;1038               break;
;;;1039   
;;;1040           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST_STALL:
;;;1041               USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;1042               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;1043               break;
;;;1044   
;;;1045           case MSC_BS_CSW:
;;;1046               BulkStage = MSC_BS_CBW;
000016  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000018  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L2.26|
;;;1047               break;
;;;1048   
;;;1049           default:
;;;1050               break;
;;;1051       }
;;;1052   }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L2.28|
00001c  480a              LDR      r0,|L2.72|
00001e  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]          ;1027  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000020  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28              ;1027
000022  d001              BEQ      |L2.40|
000024  28a8              CMP      r0,#0xa8              ;1027
000026  d1f8              BNE      |L2.26|

00002e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW

                  USBD_MSC_BulkOut PROC
;;;1060   
;;;1061   void USBD_MSC_BulkOut(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1062   {
;;;1063       switch (BulkStage) {
000002  4a1d              LDR      r2,|L3.120|
000004  7811              LDRB     r1,[r2,#0]  ; BulkStage
000006  2900              CMP      r1,#0
000008  d00f              BEQ      |L3.42|
00000a  2901              CMP      r1,#1
00000c  d010              BEQ      |L3.48|
;;;1064           case MSC_BS_CBW:
;;;1065               USBD_MSC_GetCBW();
;;;1066               break;
;;;1067   
;;;1068           case MSC_BS_DATA_OUT:
;;;1069               switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;1070                   case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;1071                   case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;1072                       USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite();
;;;1073                       break;
;;;1074   
;;;1075                   case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;1076                       USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify();
;;;1077                       break;
;;;1078               }
;;;1079               break;
;;;1080   
;;;1081           case MSC_BS_CSW:
;;;1082               // Previous transfer must be complete
;;;1083               // before the next transfer begins.
;;;1084               //
;;;1085               // If bulk out is stalled then just
;;;1086               // drop this packet and don't assert.
;;;1087               // This packet was left over from before
;;;1088               // the transfer aborted with a stall.
;;;1089               util_assert(USBD_EndPointHalt & (1 << usbd_msc_ep_bulkout));
00000e  481b              LDR      r0,|L3.124|
000010  2905              CMP      r1,#5                 ;1063
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
000014  d01b              BEQ      |L3.78|
000016  2907              CMP      r1,#7                 ;1063
000018  d027              BEQ      |L3.106|
;;;1090               break;
;;;1091   
;;;1092           case MSC_BS_RESET:
;;;1093               // If Bulk-Only Mass Storage Reset command was received on
;;;1094               // Control Endpoint ignore next Bulk OUT transfer if it was not
;;;1095               // a CBW (as it means it was a unprocessed leftover from 
;;;1096               // transfer before reset happened)
;;;1097               BulkStage = MSC_BS_CBW;
;;;1098               if (BulkLen == sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW)) {
;;;1099                   // If it is a CBW size packet go process it as CBW
;;;1100                   USBD_MSC_GetCBW();
;;;1101               }
;;;1102               break;
;;;1103   
;;;1104           default:
;;;1105               USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;1106               USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
00001e  4918              LDR      r1,|L3.128|
000020  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000022  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;1107               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000024  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;1108               break;
;;;1109       }
;;;1110   }
000028  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.42|
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_GetCBW
                  |L3.46|
00002e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.48|
000030  4813              LDR      r0,|L3.128|
000032  381f              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x1f           ;1069
000034  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]          ;1069  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000036  282a              CMP      r0,#0x2a              ;1069
000038  d003              BEQ      |L3.66|
00003a  282f              CMP      r0,#0x2f              ;1069
00003c  d004              BEQ      |L3.72|
00003e  28aa              CMP      r0,#0xaa              ;1069
000040  d1f5              BNE      |L3.46|
                  |L3.66|
000042  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite
000046  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.72|
000048  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify
00004c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.78|
00004e  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;1089
000050  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0              ;1089
000052  480c              LDR      r0,|L3.132|
000054  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;1089  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
000056  4201              TST      r1,r0                 ;1089
000058  d001              BEQ      |L3.94|
00005a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1089
00005c  e000              B        |L3.96|
                  |L3.94|
00005e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1089
                  |L3.96|
000060  4a09              LDR      r2,|L3.136|
000062  a10a              ADR      r1,|L3.140|
000064  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
000068  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.106|
00006a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1097
00006c  7010              STRB     r0,[r2,#0]            ;1097
00006e  6b10              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x30]         ;1098  ; BulkLen
000070  281f              CMP      r0,#0x1f              ;1098
000072  d0da              BEQ      |L3.42|
000074  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1111   
                          ENDP

000076  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L3.120|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L3.124|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L3.128|

                  |L3.136|

                  USBD_MSC_ClrStallEP PROC
;;;93     
;;;94     void USBD_MSC_ClrStallEP(U32 EPNum)        /* clear EP halt status according stall status */
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;95     {
;;;96         U32 n, m;
;;;97         n = USBD_SetupPacket.wIndexL & 0x8F;
000002  4812              LDR      r0,|L5.76|
000004  7901              LDRB     r1,[r0,#4]  ; USBD_SetupPacket
000006  208f              MOVS     r0,#0x8f
000008  4001              ANDS     r1,r1,r0
;;;98         m = (n & 0x80) ? ((1 << 16) << (n & 0x0F)) : (1 << n);
00000a  0608              LSLS     r0,r1,#24
00000c  d505              BPL      |L5.26|
00000e  0708              LSLS     r0,r1,#28
000010  0f00              LSRS     r0,r0,#28
000012  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000014  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000016  4082              LSLS     r2,r2,r0
000018  e001              B        |L5.30|
                  |L5.26|
00001a  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00001c  408a              LSLS     r2,r2,r1
                  |L5.30|
;;;99     
;;;100        if ((n == (usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80)) && ((USBD_EndPointHalt & m) != 0)) {
00001e  480c              LDR      r0,|L5.80|
000020  7804              LDRB     r4,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000022  2080              MOVS     r0,#0x80
000024  4304              ORRS     r4,r4,r0
000026  428c              CMP      r4,r1
000028  d10e              BNE      |L5.72|
00002a  480a              LDR      r0,|L5.84|
00002c  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
00002e  4210              TST      r0,r2
000030  d00a              BEQ      |L5.72|
;;;101            /* Compliance Test: rewrite CSW after unstall */
;;;102            if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature == MSC_CSW_Signature) {
000032  4809              LDR      r0,|L5.88|
000034  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000038  4908              LDR      r1,|L5.92|
00003a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00003c  d104              BNE      |L5.72|
;;;103                USBD_WriteEP((usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80), (U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CSW, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CSW));
00003e  220d              MOVS     r2,#0xd
000040  4905              LDR      r1,|L5.88|
000042  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000044  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
                  |L5.72|
;;;104            }
;;;105        }
;;;106    }
000048  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;107    
                          ENDP

00004a  0000              DCW      0x0000

                  USBD_MSC_DataInFormat PROC
;;;432    
;;;433    BOOL USBD_MSC_DataInFormat(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;434    {
;;;435        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength == 0) {
000002  480c              LDR      r0,|L6.52|
000004  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
;;;436            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
000008  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L6.52|
00000a  2502              MOVS     r5,#2
00000c  3417              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x17
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;435
000010  d008              BEQ      |L6.36|
;;;437            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;438            return (__FALSE);
;;;439        }
;;;440    
;;;441        if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
000012  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000014  381f              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x1f
000016  7b00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000018  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
00001a  d408              BMI      |L6.46|
;;;442            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00001c  4806              LDR      r0,|L6.56|
00001e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
                  |L6.36|
000024  7325              STRB     r5,[r4,#0xc]          ;436
000026  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
00002a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;438
;;;443            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;444            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;445            return (__FALSE);
;;;446        }
;;;447    
;;;448        return (__TRUE);
;;;449    }
00002c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L6.46|
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;448
000030  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;450    
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L6.52|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x8
                  |L6.56|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer PROC
;;;457    
;;;458    void USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;459    {
;;;460        if (BulkLen >= USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength) {
000002  4811              LDR      r0,|L7.72|
000004  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000008  4c10              LDR      r4,|L7.76|
00000a  6b21              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00000c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000e  d802              BHI      |L7.22|
;;;461            BulkLen = USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength;
;;;462            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
000010  6320              STR      r0,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000012  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000014  e000              B        |L7.24|
                  |L7.22|
;;;463        } else {
;;;464            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST_STALL; /* short or zero packet */
000016  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
                  |L7.24|
000018  7020              STRB     r0,[r4,#0]
;;;465        }
;;;466    
;;;467        USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, BulkLen);
00001a  480d              LDR      r0,|L7.80|
00001c  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
00001e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000020  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000022  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000024  490b              LDR      r1,|L7.84|
000026  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;468        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00002a  4807              LDR      r0,|L7.72|
00002c  301f              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x1f
00002e  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000030  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000034  6b21              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000036  1a40              SUBS     r0,r0,r1
000038  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;469        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
00003e  4902              LDR      r1,|L7.72|
000040  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000042  3117              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x17
000044  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;470    }
000046  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;471    
                          ENDP

                  |L7.72|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x8
                  |L7.76|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L7.80|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L7.84|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event PROC
;;;1127   
;;;1128   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event(U32 event)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1129   {
;;;1130       USBD_MSC_BulkIn();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_BulkIn
;;;1131   }
000006  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1132   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event PROC
;;;1139   
;;;1140   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event(U32 event)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1141   {
;;;1142       BulkLen = USBD_ReadEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize);
000002  4806              LDR      r0,|L9.28|
000004  4906              LDR      r1,|L9.32|
000006  8802              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize
000008  4806              LDR      r0,|L9.36|
00000a  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_ReadEP
000010  4905              LDR      r1,|L9.40|
;;;1143       USBD_MSC_BulkOut();
000012  6308              STR      r0,[r1,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000014  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_BulkOut
;;;1144   }
000018  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1145   
                          ENDP

00001a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L9.28|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize
                  |L9.32|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L9.36|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L9.40|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event PROC
;;;1154   
;;;1155   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event(U32 event)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1156   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1157       if (event & USBD_EVT_OUT) {
000004  0740              LSLS     r0,r0,#29
000006  d502              BPL      |L10.14|
;;;1158           USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event(0);
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event
                  |L10.14|
;;;1159       }
;;;1160   
;;;1161       if (event & USBD_EVT_IN) {
00000e  0720              LSLS     r0,r4,#28
000010  d501              BPL      |L10.22|
000012  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_BulkIn
                  |L10.22|
;;;1162           USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event(0);
;;;1163       }
;;;1164   }
000016  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1165   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_GetCBW||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_GetCBW PROC
;;;850    
;;;851    void USBD_MSC_GetCBW(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;852    {
;;;853        U32 n;
;;;854        U32 copy_size;
;;;855        copy_size = MIN(BulkLen, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW));
000002  4e70              LDR      r6,|L11.452|
000004  6b31              LDR      r1,[r6,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000006  291f              CMP      r1,#0x1f
000008  d201              BCS      |L11.14|
00000a  460a              MOV      r2,r1                 ;852
00000c  e000              B        |L11.16|
                  |L11.14|
00000e  221f              MOVS     r2,#0x1f
                  |L11.16|
;;;856    
;;;857        for (n = 0; n < copy_size; n++) {
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;858            *((U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CBW + n) = USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n];
000012  4d6d              LDR      r5,|L11.456|
000014  4b6d              LDR      r3,|L11.460|
000016  e002              B        |L11.30|
                  |L11.24|
000018  5c1c              LDRB     r4,[r3,r0]
00001a  542c              STRB     r4,[r5,r0]
00001c  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
                  |L11.30|
00001e  4290              CMP      r0,r2                 ;857
000020  d3fa              BCC      |L11.24|
;;;859        }
;;;860    
;;;861        if ((BulkLen == sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW)) && (USBD_MSC_CBW.dSignature == MSC_CBW_Signature)) {
;;;862            /* Valid USBD_MSC_CBW */
;;;863            USBD_MSC_CSW.dTag = USBD_MSC_CBW.dTag;
;;;864            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength;
;;;865    
;;;866            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN      >  0) ||
;;;867                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.bCBLength <  1) ||
;;;868                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.bCBLength > 16)) {
;;;869    fail:
;;;870                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
000022  486b              LDR      r0,|L11.464|
;;;871                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;872            } else {
;;;873                switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;874                    case SCSI_TEST_UNIT_READY:
;;;875                        USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady();
;;;876                        break;
;;;877    
;;;878                    case SCSI_REQUEST_SENSE:
;;;879                        USBD_MSC_RequestSense();
;;;880                        break;
;;;881    
;;;882                    case SCSI_FORMAT_UNIT:
;;;883                        goto fail;
;;;884    
;;;885                    case SCSI_INQUIRY:
;;;886                        USBD_MSC_Inquiry();
;;;887                        break;
;;;888    
;;;889                    case SCSI_START_STOP_UNIT:
;;;890                        USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit();
;;;891                        break;
;;;892    
;;;893                    case SCSI_MEDIA_REMOVAL:
;;;894                        USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval();
;;;895                        break;
;;;896    
;;;897                    case SCSI_MODE_SELECT6:
;;;898                        goto fail;
;;;899    
;;;900                    case SCSI_MODE_SENSE6:
;;;901                        USBD_MSC_ModeSense6();
;;;902                        break;
;;;903    
;;;904                    case SCSI_MODE_SELECT10:
;;;905                        goto fail;
;;;906    
;;;907                    case SCSI_MODE_SENSE10:
;;;908                        USBD_MSC_ModeSense10();
;;;909                        break;
;;;910    
;;;911                    case SCSI_READ_FORMAT_CAPACITIES:
;;;912                        USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity();
;;;913                        break;
;;;914    
;;;915                    case SCSI_READ_CAPACITY:
;;;916                        USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity();
;;;917                        break;
;;;918    
;;;919                    case SCSI_ATA_COMMAND_PASS_THROUGH12:
;;;920                        USBD_MSC_ATAPassThrough();
;;;921                        break;
;;;922    
;;;923                    case SCSI_SERVICE_ACTION_IN16:
;;;924                        USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16();
;;;925                        break;
;;;926    
;;;927                    case SCSI_READ10:
;;;928                    case SCSI_READ12:
;;;929                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;930                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {
;;;931                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN;
;;;932                                USBD_MSC_MemoryRead();
;;;933                            } else {                       /* direction mismatch */
;;;934                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;935                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;936                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;937                            }
;;;938                        }
;;;939    
;;;940                        break;
;;;941    
;;;942                    case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;943                    case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;944                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;945                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
;;;946                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_OUT;
;;;947                            } else {                       /* direction mismatch */
;;;948                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
000024  2280              MOVS     r2,#0x80
000026  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
000028  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;870
00002a  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
00002c  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;861
00002e  291f              CMP      r1,#0x1f              ;861
000030  d170              BNE      |L11.276|
000032  4865              LDR      r0,|L11.456|
000034  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000038  4966              LDR      r1,|L11.468|
00003a  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;861
00003c  d16a              BNE      |L11.276|
00003e  1d28              ADDS     r0,r5,#4              ;863
000040  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000044  4c60              LDR      r4,|L11.456|
000046  341f              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x1f           ;863
000048  1d21              ADDS     r1,r4,#4              ;863
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
00004e  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;864
000050  3817              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x17           ;864
000052  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000056  4621              MOV      r1,r4                 ;864
000058  3108              ADDS     r1,r1,#8              ;864
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
00005e  7b68              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xd]          ;866  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000060  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;866
000062  d104              BNE      |L11.110|
000064  7ba8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xe]          ;867  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;867
000068  d001              BEQ      |L11.110|
00006a  2810              CMP      r0,#0x10              ;868
00006c  d901              BLS      |L11.114|
                  |L11.110|
00006e  7327              STRB     r7,[r4,#0xc]          ;870
000070  e074              B        |L11.348|
                  |L11.114|
000072  7be8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xf]          ;873  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000074  282a              CMP      r0,#0x2a              ;873
000076  d03b              BEQ      |L11.240|
000078  dc20              BGT      |L11.188|
00007a  281a              CMP      r0,#0x1a              ;873
00007c  d047              BEQ      |L11.270|
00007e  dc0e              BGT      |L11.158|
000080  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;873
000082  d0f4              BEQ      |L11.110|
000084  dc06              BGT      |L11.148|
000086  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;873
000088  d03b              BEQ      |L11.258|
00008a  2803              CMP      r0,#3                 ;873
00008c  d1ef              BNE      |L11.110|
00008e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_RequestSense
;;;949                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;950                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;951                            }
;;;952                        }
;;;953    
;;;954                        break;
;;;955    
;;;956                    case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;957                        if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[1] & 0x02) == 0) {
;;;958                            // BYTCHK = 0 -> CRC Check (not implemented)
;;;959                            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
;;;960                            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;961                            break;
;;;962                        }
;;;963    
;;;964                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;965                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
;;;966                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_OUT;
;;;967                                MemOK = __TRUE;
;;;968                            } else {
;;;969                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;970                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;971                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;972                            }
;;;973                        }
;;;974    
;;;975                        break;
;;;976    
;;;977                    case SCSI_SYNC_CACHE10:
;;;978                    case SCSI_SYNC_CACHE16:
;;;979                        USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache();
;;;980                        break;
;;;981    
;;;982                    case SCSI_REPORT_ID_INFO:
;;;983                        USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;984                        goto fail;
;;;985    
;;;986                    default:
;;;987                        goto fail;
;;;988                }
;;;989            }
;;;990        } else {
;;;991            /* Invalid USBD_MSC_CBW */
;;;992            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;993            /* set EP to stay stalled */
;;;994            USBD_EndPointStall |= ((1 << 16) << (usbd_msc_ep_bulkin & 0x0F));
;;;995            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;996            /* set EP to stay stalled */
;;;997            USBD_EndPointStall |=  1 << usbd_msc_ep_bulkout;
;;;998            BulkStage = MSC_BS_ERROR;
;;;999        }
;;;1000   }
000092  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L11.148|
000094  2812              CMP      r0,#0x12              ;873
000096  d1ea              BNE      |L11.110|
000098  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_Inquiry
00009c  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L11.158|
00009e  2823              CMP      r0,#0x23              ;873
0000a0  d03c              BEQ      |L11.284|
0000a2  dc06              BGT      |L11.178|
0000a4  281b              CMP      r0,#0x1b              ;873
0000a6  d02f              BEQ      |L11.264|
0000a8  281e              CMP      r0,#0x1e              ;873
0000aa  d1e0              BNE      |L11.110|
0000ac  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval
0000b0  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L11.178|
0000b2  2825              CMP      r0,#0x25              ;873
0000b4  d035              BEQ      |L11.290|
0000b6  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28              ;873
0000b8  d1d9              BNE      |L11.110|
0000ba  e03b              B        |L11.308|
                  |L11.188|
0000bc  289e              CMP      r0,#0x9e              ;873

0000c0  dc0e              BGT      |L11.224|

                  |L11.210|

                  |L11.222|

                  |L11.258|

                  |L11.270|

                  |L11.274|

                  |L11.278|

000146  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryRead

                  |L11.332|
00014c  4822              LDR      r0,|L11.472|

                  |L11.338|

                  |L11.348|
