000160  e7d7              B        |L11.274|
                  |L11.354|
000162  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_RWSetup
000166  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;964
000168  d0d3              BEQ      |L11.274|
00016a  7b28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xc]          ;965  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00016c  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24             ;965
00016e  d402              BMI      |L11.374|
000170  7037              STRB     r7,[r6,#0]            ;966
000172  6237              STR      r7,[r6,#0x20]         ;967  ; MemOK
000174  e7cd              B        |L11.274|
                  |L11.374|
000176  4816              LDR      r0,|L11.464|
000178  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80              ;969
00017a  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;969  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
00017c  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;969
                  |L11.382|
00017e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
000182  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;970
000184  e7e9              B        |L11.346|
                  |L11.390|
000186  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;983
000188  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00018c  e76f              B        |L11.110|
                  |L11.398|
00018e  4c10              LDR      r4,|L11.464|
000190  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;992
000192  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
000196  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;994  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000198  4c10              LDR      r4,|L11.476|
00019a  0701              LSLS     r1,r0,#28             ;994
00019c  0f09              LSRS     r1,r1,#28             ;994
00019e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;994
0001a0  0400              LSLS     r0,r0,#16             ;994
0001a2  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1              ;994
0001a4  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;994  ; USBD_EndPointStall
0001a6  4d0c              LDR      r5,|L11.472|
0001a8  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;994
0001aa  6020              STR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;995  ; USBD_EndPointStall
0001ac  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]            ;995  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
0001ae  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
0001b2  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]            ;997  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
0001b4  4087              LSLS     r7,r7,r0              ;997
0001b6  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;997  ; USBD_EndPointStall
0001b8  4307              ORRS     r7,r7,r0              ;997
0001ba  2006              MOVS     r0,#6                 ;998
0001bc  6027              STR      r7,[r4,#0]            ;998  ; USBD_EndPointStall
0001be  7030              STRB     r0,[r6,#0]            ;998
0001c0  e7a7              B        |L11.274|
;;;1001   
                          ENDP

0001c2  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L11.452|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L11.456|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L11.460|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L11.464|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L11.468|
                          DCD      0x43425355
                  |L11.472|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L11.476|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointStall

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN PROC
;;;131    
;;;132    BOOL USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN(void)
000000  4902              LDR      r1,|L12.12|
;;;133    {
;;;134        USBD_EP0Buf[0] = 0;                      /* one LUN associated with this device */
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;135        return (__TRUE);
000006  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;136    }
000008  4770              BX       lr
;;;137    
                          ENDP

00000a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L12.12|
                          DCD      USBD_EP0Buf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Inquiry||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_Inquiry PROC
;;;561    
;;;562    void USBD_MSC_Inquiry(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;563    {
;;;564        U8  i;
;;;565        U8 *ptr_str;
;;;566    
;;;567        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d01f              BEQ      |L13.74|
;;;568            return;
;;;569        }
;;;570    
;;;571        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;             /* Direct Access Device */
00000a  4b10              LDR      r3,|L13.76|
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000e  7018              STRB     r0,[r3,#0]
;;;572        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x80;             /* RMB = 1: Removable Medium */
000010  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000012  7059              STRB     r1,[r3,#1]
;;;573        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x02;             /* Version: ANSI X3.131: 1994 */
000014  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000016  7099              STRB     r1,[r3,#2]
;;;574        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x02;
000018  70d9              STRB     r1,[r3,#3]
;;;575        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 36 - 4;           /* Additional Length */
00001a  2420              MOVS     r4,#0x20
00001c  711c              STRB     r4,[r3,#4]
;;;576        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;             /* SCCS = 0: No Storage Controller Component */
00001e  7158              STRB     r0,[r3,#5]
;;;577        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
000020  7198              STRB     r0,[r3,#6]
;;;578        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x00;
000022  71d8              STRB     r0,[r3,#7]
;;;579        ptr_str = (U8 *)usbd_msc_inquiry_data;
000024  480a              LDR      r0,|L13.80|
;;;580    
;;;581        for (i = 8; i < 36; i++) {               /* Product Information    + */
000026  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_inquiry_data
000028  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
                  |L13.42|
;;;582            if (*ptr_str) {                        /* Product Revision Level   */
00002a  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]
00002c  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
00002e  d002              BEQ      |L13.54|
;;;583                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[i] = *ptr_str++;
000030  541a              STRB     r2,[r3,r0]
000032  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000034  e000              B        |L13.56|
                  |L13.54|
;;;584            } else {
;;;585                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[i] = ' ';
000036  541c              STRB     r4,[r3,r0]
                  |L13.56|
000038  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00003a  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0                 ;581
00003c  2824              CMP      r0,#0x24              ;581
00003e  d3f4              BCC      |L13.42|
;;;586            }
;;;587        }
;;;588    
;;;589        BulkLen = 36;
000040  4904              LDR      r1,|L13.84|
000042  2024              MOVS     r0,#0x24
;;;590        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000044  6308              STR      r0,[r1,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000046  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L13.74|
;;;591    }
00004a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;592    
                          ENDP

                  |L13.76|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L13.80|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_inquiry_data
                  |L13.84|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval PROC
;;;620    
;;;621    void USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;622    {
;;;623        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] & 1) {            /* If prevent */
000002  4805              LDR      r0,|L14.24|
000004  7cc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x13]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000006  07c1              LSLS     r1,r0,#31
;;;624            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;    /* Prevent media removal -> fail */
000008  4804              LDR      r0,|L14.28|
00000a  d000              BEQ      |L14.14|
00000c  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
                  |L14.14|
;;;625        } else {                                 /* If allow */
;;;626            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;    /* Allow media removal -> pass */
00000e  7301              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xc]
;;;627        }
;;;628    
;;;629        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000010  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;630    }
000014  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;631    
                          ENDP

000016  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L14.24|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L14.28|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryRead||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryRead PROC
;;;176    
;;;177    void USBD_MSC_MemoryRead(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;178    {
;;;179        U32 n, m;
;;;180    
;;;181        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4d31              LDR      r5,|L15.200|
;;;182            n = 0;
;;;183            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
000004  4f31              LDR      r7,|L15.204|
000006  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]         ;181  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;181  ; Block
00000a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00000c  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;181
00000e  d30a              BCC      |L15.38|
000010  7838              LDRB     r0,[r7,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000012  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000014  2400              MOVS     r4,#0                 ;182
000016  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000018  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;184            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
00001c  482c              LDR      r0,|L15.208|
00001e  7306              STRB     r6,[r0,#0xc]
;;;185            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000024  e008              B        |L15.56|
                  |L15.38|
;;;186        } else {
;;;187            if (Length > usbd_msc_maxpacketsize[USBD_HighSpeed]) {
000026  482b              LDR      r0,|L15.212|
000028  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; USBD_HighSpeed
00002a  0041              LSLS     r1,r0,#1
00002c  482a              LDR      r0,|L15.216|
00002e  5a44              LDRH     r4,[r0,r1]
000030  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
000032  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000034  d300              BCC      |L15.56|
;;;188                n = usbd_msc_maxpacketsize[USBD_HighSpeed];
;;;189            } else {
;;;190                n = Length;
000036  4604              MOV      r4,r0
                  |L15.56|
;;;191            }
;;;192        }
;;;193    
;;;194        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000038  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00003c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00003e  d100              BNE      |L15.66|
;;;195            n = 0;
000040  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
                  |L15.66|
;;;196        }
;;;197    
;;;198        if ((Offset == 0) && (n != 0)) {
000042  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000044  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000046  d02d              BEQ      |L15.164|
;;;199            m = (Length + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
;;;200    
;;;201            if (m > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
;;;202                m = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;203            }
;;;204    
;;;205            usbd_msc_read_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, m);
;;;206        }
;;;207    
;;;208        if (n) {
000048  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
00004a  d00e              BEQ      |L15.106|
                  |L15.76|
;;;209            USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, &USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset], n);
00004c  6aa9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
00004e  69e8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x1c]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000050  2280              MOVS     r2,#0x80
000052  1841              ADDS     r1,r0,r1
000054  7838              LDRB     r0,[r7,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000056  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000058  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;210            Offset += n;
00005e  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000060  1900              ADDS     r0,r0,r4
;;;211            Length -= n;
000062  62a8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000064  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
000066  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
000068  62e8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
                  |L15.106|
;;;212        }
;;;213    
;;;214        if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
00006a  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00006c  6968              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
00006e  6aaa              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000070  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1
000072  4291              CMP      r1,r2
000074  d103              BNE      |L15.126|
;;;215            Offset = 0;
;;;216            Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
000076  62ae              STR      r6,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000078  6a69              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
00007a  1808              ADDS     r0,r1,r0
00007c  6268              STR      r0,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
                  |L15.126|
;;;217        }
;;;218    
;;;219        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= n;
00007e  4814              LDR      r0,|L15.208|
000080  3008              ADDS     r0,r0,#8
000082  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000084  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000088  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
00008a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00008c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;220    
;;;221        if (!n) {
000090  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
000092  d006              BEQ      |L15.162|
;;;222            return;
;;;223        }
;;;224    
;;;225        if (Length == 0) {
000094  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
000096  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000098  d103              BNE      |L15.162|
;;;226            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
00009a  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00009c  7028              STRB     r0,[r5,#0]
;;;227            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
00009e  480c              LDR      r0,|L15.208|
0000a0  7306              STRB     r6,[r0,#0xc]
                  |L15.162|
;;;228        }
;;;229    }
0000a2  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L15.164|
0000a4  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;198
0000a6  d0e0              BEQ      |L15.106|
0000a8  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]         ;199  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
0000aa  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]         ;199  ; Length
0000ac  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;199
0000ae  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;199
0000b0  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
0000b4  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;201  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
0000b6  4602              MOV      r2,r0                 ;199
0000b8  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;201
0000ba  d900              BLS      |L15.190|
0000bc  460a              MOV      r2,r1                 ;202
                  |L15.190|
0000be  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;205  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
0000c0  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;205  ; Block
0000c2  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_read_sect
0000c6  e7c1              B        |L15.76|
;;;230    
                          ENDP

                  |L15.200|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L15.204|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L15.208|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L15.212|
                          DCD      USBD_HighSpeed
                  |L15.216|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_maxpacketsize

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify PROC
;;;304    
;;;305    void USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;306    {
;;;307        U32 n;
;;;308    
;;;309        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4c33              LDR      r4,|L16.208|
000004  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000006  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
00000a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000c  d308              BCC      |L16.32|
;;;310            BulkLen = 0;
;;;311            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00000e  4831              LDR      r0,|L16.212|
000010  6325              STR      r5,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000014  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;312            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000018  482f              LDR      r0,|L16.216|
00001a  7305              STRB     r5,[r0,#0xc]
;;;313            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L16.32|
;;;314        }
;;;315    
;;;316        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d006              BEQ      |L16.54|
;;;317            BulkLen = 0;
;;;318        }
;;;319    
;;;320        if (BulkLen) {
000028  6b20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00002c  d024              BEQ      |L16.120|
;;;321            if ((Offset == 0) && (BulkLen != 0)) {
00002e  6aa0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000030  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000032  d002              BEQ      |L16.58|
000034  e010              B        |L16.88|
                  |L16.54|
000036  6325              STR      r5,[r4,#0x30]         ;317  ; BulkLen
000038  e01e              B        |L16.120|
                  |L16.58|
;;;322                n = (Length + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
00003a  6921              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00003c  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
00003e  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
000040  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000042  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;323    
;;;324                if (n > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
000046  6961              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000048  4602              MOV      r2,r0                 ;322
00004a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00004c  d900              BLS      |L16.80|
;;;325                    n = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
00004e  460a              MOV      r2,r1
                  |L16.80|
;;;326                }
;;;327    
;;;328                usbd_msc_read_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, n);
000050  69e1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x1c]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000052  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
000054  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_read_sect
                  |L16.88|
;;;329            }
;;;330    
;;;331            for (n = 0; n < BulkLen; n++) {
000058  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;332                if (USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset + n] != USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n]) {
00005a  4920              LDR      r1,|L16.220|
00005c  6aa7              LDR      r7,[r4,#0x28]         ;331
00005e  6b26              LDR      r6,[r4,#0x30]         ;331
000060  e008              B        |L16.116|
                  |L16.98|
000062  69e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x1c]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000064  183a              ADDS     r2,r7,r0
000066  5c9a              LDRB     r2,[r3,r2]
000068  5c0b              LDRB     r3,[r1,r0]
00006a  429a              CMP      r2,r3
00006c  d001              BEQ      |L16.114|
;;;333                    MemOK = __FALSE;
;;;334                    break;
00006e  6225              STR      r5,[r4,#0x20]  ; MemOK
000070  e002              B        |L16.120|
                  |L16.114|
000072  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
                  |L16.116|
000074  42b0              CMP      r0,r6                 ;331
000076  d3f4              BCC      |L16.98|
                  |L16.120|
;;;335                }
;;;336            }
;;;337        }
;;;338    
;;;339        Offset += BulkLen;
000078  6b26              LDR      r6,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00007a  6aa0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
00007c  1981              ADDS     r1,r0,r6
;;;340        Length -= BulkLen;
00007e  62a1              STR      r1,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000080  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
000082  1b87              SUBS     r7,r0,r6
;;;341    
;;;342        if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
000084  62e7              STR      r7,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
000086  6922              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
000088  6960              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
00008a  4342              MULS     r2,r0,r2
00008c  428a              CMP      r2,r1
00008e  d103              BNE      |L16.152|
;;;343            Offset = 0;
;;;344            Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
000090  62a5              STR      r5,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000092  6a61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
000094  1808              ADDS     r0,r1,r0
000096  6260              STR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
                  |L16.152|
;;;345        }
;;;346    
;;;347        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
000098  480f              LDR      r0,|L16.216|
00009a  3008              ADDS     r0,r0,#8
00009c  4605              MOV      r5,r0
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
0000a2  1b80              SUBS     r0,r0,r6
0000a4  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0000a6  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;348    
;;;349        if (!BulkLen) {
0000aa  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
0000ac  d00c              BEQ      |L16.200|
;;;350            return;
;;;351        }
;;;352    
;;;353        if ((Length == 0) || (BulkStage == MSC_BS_CSW)) {
0000ae  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
0000b0  d002              BEQ      |L16.184|
0000b2  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]  ; BulkStage
0000b4  2805              CMP      r0,#5
0000b6  d107              BNE      |L16.200|
                  |L16.184|
;;;354            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = (MemOK) ? CSW_CMD_PASSED : CSW_CMD_FAILED;
0000b8  6a20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x20]  ; MemOK
0000ba  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000bc  d005              BEQ      |L16.202|
0000be  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L16.192|
0000c0  4905              LDR      r1,|L16.216|
0000c2  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;355            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
0000c4  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L16.200|
;;;356        }
;;;357    }
0000c8  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L16.202|
0000ca  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;354
0000cc  e7f8              B        |L16.192|
;;;358    
                          ENDP

0000ce  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L16.208|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L16.212|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L16.216|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L16.220|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite PROC
;;;238    
;;;239    void USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;240    {
;;;241        U32 n;
;;;242    
;;;243        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4d38              LDR      r5,|L17.228|
;;;244            BulkLen = 0;
;;;245            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;246            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000004  4f38              LDR      r7,|L17.232|
000006  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]         ;243  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;243  ; Block
00000a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00000c  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;243
00000e  d307              BCC      |L17.32|
000010  4836              LDR      r0,|L17.236|
000012  632e              STR      r6,[r5,#0x30]         ;245  ; BulkLen
000014  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;245  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000016  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00001a  733e              STRB     r6,[r7,#0xc]
;;;247            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L17.32|
;;;248        }
;;;249    
;;;250        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d100              BNE      |L17.42|
;;;251            BulkLen = 0;
000028  632e              STR      r6,[r5,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
                  |L17.42|
;;;252        }
;;;253    
;;;254        if (Offset + BulkLen > USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
00002a  6b29              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002c  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
00002e  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
000030  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
000032  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000034  d906              BLS      |L17.68|
;;;255            // This write would have overflowed USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
;;;256            util_assert(0);
000036  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000038  3201              ADDS     r2,#1
00003a  a12d              ADR      r1,|L17.240|
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
                  |L17.66|
;;;257            return;
;;;258        }
;;;259    
;;;260        for (n = 0; n < BulkLen; n++) {
;;;261            USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset + n] = USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n];
;;;262        }
;;;263    
;;;264        Offset += BulkLen;
;;;265        Length -= BulkLen;
;;;266    
;;;267        if (BulkLen) {
;;;268            if ((Length == 0) && (Offset != 0)) {
;;;269                n = (Offset + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
;;;270    
;;;271                if (n > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
;;;272                    n = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;273                }
;;;274    
;;;275                usbd_msc_write_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, n);
;;;276                Offset = 0;
;;;277                Block += n;
;;;278            } else if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
;;;279                usbd_msc_write_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, USBD_MSC_BlockGroup);
;;;280                Offset = 0;
;;;281                Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;282            }
;;;283        }
;;;284    
;;;285        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
;;;286    
;;;287        if (!BulkLen) {
;;;288            return;
;;;289        }
;;;290    
;;;291        if ((Length == 0) || (BulkStage == MSC_BS_CSW)) {
;;;292            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
;;;293            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;294        }
;;;295    }
000042  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L17.68|
000044  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;260
000046  492c              LDR      r1,|L17.248|
000048  e005              B        |L17.86|
                  |L17.74|
00004a  6aab              LDR      r3,[r5,#0x28]         ;261  ; Offset
00004c  5c0a              LDRB     r2,[r1,r0]            ;261
00004e  181b              ADDS     r3,r3,r0              ;261
000050  69ec              LDR      r4,[r5,#0x1c]         ;261  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000052  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;261
000054  54e2              STRB     r2,[r4,r3]            ;261
                  |L17.86|
000056  6b2a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x30]         ;260  ; BulkLen
000058  4290              CMP      r0,r2                 ;260
00005a  d3f6              BCC      |L17.74|
00005c  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]         ;264  ; Offset
00005e  1880              ADDS     r0,r0,r2              ;264
000060  62a8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x28]         ;265  ; Offset
000062  6ae9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x2c]         ;265  ; Length
000064  1a89              SUBS     r1,r1,r2              ;265
000066  62e9              STR      r1,[r5,#0x2c]         ;267  ; Length
000068  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;267
00006a  d025              BEQ      |L17.184|
00006c  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;268
00006e  d114              BNE      |L17.154|
000070  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;268
000072  d012              BEQ      |L17.154|
000074  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]         ;269  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
000076  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;269
000078  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;269
00007a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
00007e  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;271  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000080  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;269
000082  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;271
000084  d900              BLS      |L17.136|
000086  460c              MOV      r4,r1                 ;272
                  |L17.136|
000088  4622              MOV      r2,r4                 ;275
00008a  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;275  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
00008c  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;275  ; Block
00008e  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_write_sect
000092  62ae              STR      r6,[r5,#0x28]         ;277  ; Offset
000094  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;277  ; Block
000096  1900              ADDS     r0,r0,r4              ;277
000098  e00d              B        |L17.182|
                  |L17.154|
00009a  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;278  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
00009c  692b              LDR      r3,[r5,#0x10]         ;278  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00009e  460a              MOV      r2,r1                 ;278
0000a0  4359              MULS     r1,r3,r1              ;278
0000a2  4281              CMP      r1,r0                 ;278
0000a4  d108              BNE      |L17.184|
0000a6  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;279  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
0000a8  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;279  ; Block
0000aa  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_write_sect
0000ae  62ae              STR      r6,[r5,#0x28]         ;281  ; Offset
0000b0  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;281  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
0000b2  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;281  ; Block
0000b4  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;281
                  |L17.182|
0000b6  6268              STR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;281  ; Block
                  |L17.184|
0000b8  480b              LDR      r0,|L17.232|
0000ba  3008              ADDS     r0,r0,#8              ;285
0000bc  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;285
0000be  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
0000c2  6b2c              LDR      r4,[r5,#0x30]         ;285  ; BulkLen
0000c4  9900              LDR      r1,[sp,#0]            ;285
0000c6  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4              ;285
0000c8  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
0000cc  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;287
0000ce  d0b8              BEQ      |L17.66|
0000d0  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]         ;291  ; Length
0000d2  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;291
0000d4  d002              BEQ      |L17.220|
0000d6  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]            ;291  ; BulkStage
0000d8  2805              CMP      r0,#5                 ;291
0000da  d1b2              BNE      |L17.66|
                  |L17.220|
0000dc  733e              STRB     r6,[r7,#0xc]          ;292
0000de  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
0000e2  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;296    
                          ENDP

                  |L17.228|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L17.232|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L17.236|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L17.240|
0000f0  2866696c          DCB      "(file)",0
0000f4  652900  
0000f7  00                DCB      0
                  |L17.248|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ModeSense10||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ModeSense10 PROC
;;;671    
;;;672    void USBD_MSC_ModeSense10(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;673    {
;;;674        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d024              BEQ      |L18.84|
;;;675            return;
;;;676        }
;;;677    
;;;678        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d020              BEQ      |L18.84|
;;;679            return;
;;;680        }
;;;681    
;;;682        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;
000012  4811              LDR      r0,|L18.88|
000014  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;683        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x06;
000018  2206              MOVS     r2,#6
00001a  7042              STRB     r2,[r0,#1]
;;;684        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;
;;;685        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = (USBD_MSC_ReadOnly << 7);
00001c  4b0f              LDR      r3,|L18.92|
00001e  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]            ;684
000020  7a1a              LDRB     r2,[r3,#8]  ; USBD_MSC_ReadOnly
;;;686        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 0x00;
;;;687        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;
;;;688        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
;;;689        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x00;
;;;690        BulkLen = 8;
000022  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
000024  01d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#7              ;685
000026  70c2              STRB     r2,[r0,#3]            ;685
000028  7101              STRB     r1,[r0,#4]            ;686
00002a  7141              STRB     r1,[r0,#5]            ;687
00002c  7181              STRB     r1,[r0,#6]            ;688
00002e  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]            ;689
;;;691    
;;;692        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 8 bytes we have
;;;693           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;694        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000030  480b              LDR      r0,|L18.96|
000032  631c              STR      r4,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000034  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000036  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
00003a  2808              CMP      r0,#8
00003c  d908              BLS      |L18.80|
;;;695            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
00003e  4908              LDR      r1,|L18.96|
000040  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000042  391f              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x1f
000044  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
000048  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00004a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;696            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
00004c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
                  |L18.80|
;;;697        }
;;;698    
;;;699        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000050  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L18.84|
;;;700    }
000054  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;701    
                          ENDP

000056  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L18.88|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L18.92|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L18.96|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x27

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ModeSense6||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ModeSense6 PROC
;;;638    
;;;639    void USBD_MSC_ModeSense6(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;640    {
;;;641        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d020              BEQ      |L19.76|
;;;642            return;
;;;643        }
;;;644    
;;;645        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d01c              BEQ      |L19.76|
;;;646            return;
;;;647        }
;;;648    
;;;649        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x03;
000012  480f              LDR      r0,|L19.80|
000014  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;650        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000018  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;651        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = (USBD_MSC_ReadOnly << 7);
00001a  4b0e              LDR      r3,|L19.84|
00001c  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]            ;650
00001e  7a1a              LDRB     r2,[r3,#8]  ; USBD_MSC_ReadOnly
;;;652        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x00;
;;;653        BulkLen = 4;
000020  2404              MOVS     r4,#4
000022  01d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#7              ;651
000024  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]            ;651
000026  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]            ;652
;;;654    
;;;655        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 4 bytes we have
;;;656           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;657        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000028  480b              LDR      r0,|L19.88|
00002a  631c              STR      r4,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002c  4605              MOV      r5,r0
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000032  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000034  d908              BLS      |L19.72|
;;;658            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
000036  4908              LDR      r1,|L19.88|
000038  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00003a  391f              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x1f
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
000040  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000042  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;659            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
000044  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
                  |L19.72|
;;;660        }
;;;661    
;;;662        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000048  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L19.76|
;;;663    }
00004c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;664    
                          ENDP

00004e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L19.80|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L19.84|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L19.88|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x27

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_RWSetup||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_RWSetup PROC
;;;365    
;;;366    BOOL USBD_MSC_RWSetup(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;367    {
;;;368        U32 n;
;;;369        /* Logical Block Address of First Block */
;;;370        n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[2] << 24) |
000002  482a              LDR      r0,|L20.172|
000004  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000008  4d28              LDR      r5,|L20.172|
00000a  ba00              REV      r0,r0
00000c  0a04              LSRS     r4,r0,#8
00000e  3d11              SUBS     r5,r5,#0x11
000010  7d28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000012  0224              LSLS     r4,r4,#8
000014  4304              ORRS     r4,r4,r0
;;;371            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[3] << 16) |
;;;372            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] <<  8) |
;;;373            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[5] <<  0);
;;;374        Block  = n;
000016  4e26              LDR      r6,|L20.176|
;;;375        Offset = 0;
000018  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;376    
;;;377        /* Number of Blocks to transfer */
;;;378        switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
00001a  6274              STR      r4,[r6,#0x24]  ; Block
00001c  62b0              STR      r0,[r6,#0x28]  ; Offset
00001e  7be8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xf]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000020  282f              CMP      r0,#0x2f
000022  d00a              BEQ      |L20.58|
000024  dc04              BGT      |L20.48|
000026  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28
000028  d00b              BEQ      |L20.66|
00002a  282a              CMP      r0,#0x2a
00002c  d11c              BNE      |L20.104|
00002e  e004              B        |L20.58|
                  |L20.48|
000030  28a8              CMP      r0,#0xa8
000032  d010              BEQ      |L20.86|
000034  28aa              CMP      r0,#0xaa
000036  d117              BNE      |L20.104|
000038  e009              B        |L20.78|
                  |L20.58|
;;;379            case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;380            case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;381                if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00003e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000040  d030              BEQ      |L20.164|
                  |L20.66|
;;;382                    return (__FALSE);
;;;383                }
;;;384    
;;;385            case SCSI_READ10:
;;;386                n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[7] <<  8) |
000042  7de8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0x17]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000044  7da9              LDRB     r1,[r5,#0x16]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000046  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
000048  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00004a  ba44              REV16    r4,r0
;;;387                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[8] <<  0);
;;;388                break;
00004c  e00c              B        |L20.104|
                  |L20.78|
;;;389    
;;;390            case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;391                if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000052  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000054  d026              BEQ      |L20.164|
                  |L20.86|
;;;392                    return (__FALSE);
;;;393                }
;;;394    
;;;395            case SCSI_READ12:
;;;396                n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[6] << 24) |
000056  4815              LDR      r0,|L20.172|
000058  1d00              ADDS     r0,r0,#4
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
00005e  ba00              REV      r0,r0
000060  0a04              LSRS     r4,r0,#8
000062  7e28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000064  0224              LSLS     r4,r4,#8
000066  4304              ORRS     r4,r4,r0
                  |L20.104|
;;;397                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[7] << 16) |
;;;398                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[8] <<  8) |
;;;399                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[9] <<  0);
;;;400                break;
;;;401        }
;;;402    
;;;403        Length = n * USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
000068  6930              LDR      r0,[r6,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00006a  4344              MULS     r4,r0,r4
;;;404    
;;;405        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength == 0) {     /* host requests no data */
00006c  480f              LDR      r0,|L20.172|
00006e  62f4              STR      r4,[r6,#0x2c]  ; Length
000070  3809              SUBS     r0,r0,#9
000072  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
;;;406            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
000076  4f0d              LDR      r7,|L20.172|
000078  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
00007a  370e              ADDS     r7,r7,#0xe
00007c  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;405
00007e  d00d              BEQ      |L20.156|
;;;407            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;408            return (__FALSE);
;;;409        }
;;;410    
;;;411        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength != Length) {
000080  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000082  d010              BEQ      |L20.166|
;;;412            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {  /* stall appropriate EP */
000084  7b28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000086  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
000088  d504              BPL      |L20.148|
;;;413                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
00008a  480a              LDR      r0,|L20.180|
00008c  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
00008e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000090  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000092  e001              B        |L20.152|
                  |L20.148|
;;;414            } else {
;;;415                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
000094  4808              LDR      r0,|L20.184|
000096  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L20.152|
000098  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
                  |L20.156|
;;;416            }
;;;417    
;;;418            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
00009c  733e              STRB     r6,[r7,#0xc]
;;;419            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;420            return (__FALSE);
0000a2  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L20.164|
;;;421        }
;;;422    
;;;423        return (__TRUE);
;;;424    }
0000a4  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L20.166|
0000a6  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;423
0000a8  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;425    
                          ENDP

0000aa  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L20.172|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x11
                  |L20.176|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L20.180|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L20.184|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity PROC
;;;708    
;;;709    void USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;710    {
;;;711        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d01a              BEQ      |L21.64|
;;;712            return;
;;;713        }
;;;714    
;;;715        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d016              BEQ      |L21.64|
;;;716            return;
;;;717        }
;;;718    
;;;719        /* Last Logical Block */
;;;720        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >> 24) & 0xFF;
000012  4a0c              LDR      r2,|L21.68|
000014  480c              LDR      r0,|L21.72|
000016  6991              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000018  1e49              SUBS     r1,r1,#1
00001a  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
00001c  7003              STRB     r3,[r0,#0]
;;;721        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >> 16) & 0xFF;
00001e  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
000020  7043              STRB     r3,[r0,#1]
;;;722        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >>  8) & 0xFF;
000022  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
000024  7083              STRB     r3,[r0,#2]
;;;723        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >>  0) & 0xFF;
000026  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]
;;;724        /* Block Length */
;;;725        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >> 24) & 0xFF;
000028  6911              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00002a  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
00002c  7103              STRB     r3,[r0,#4]
;;;726        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >> 16) & 0xFF;
00002e  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
000030  7143              STRB     r3,[r0,#5]
;;;727        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >>  8) & 0xFF;
000032  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
000034  7183              STRB     r3,[r0,#6]
;;;728        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >>  0) & 0xFF;
000036  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]
;;;729        BulkLen = 8;
000038  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
;;;730        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
00003a  6310              STR      r0,[r2,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L21.64|
;;;731    }
000040  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;732    
                          ENDP

000042  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L21.68|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L21.72|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity PROC
;;;739    
;;;740    void USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;741    {
;;;742        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d02e              BEQ      |L22.104|
;;;743            return;
;;;744        }
;;;745    
;;;746        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d02a              BEQ      |L22.104|
;;;747            return;
;;;748        }
;;;749    
;;;750        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;
000012  4816              LDR      r0,|L22.108|
000014  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;751        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000018  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]
;;;752        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;
00001a  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]
;;;753        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x08;                      /* Capacity List Length */
00001c  2108              MOVS     r1,#8
;;;754        /* Block Count */
;;;755        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >> 24) & 0xFF;
00001e  4a14              LDR      r2,|L22.112|
000020  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]            ;753
000022  6991              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
;;;756        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >> 16) & 0xFF;
;;;757        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >>  8) & 0xFF;
;;;758        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >>  0) & 0xFF;
;;;759        /* Block Length */
;;;760        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 8] = 0x02;                      /* Descriptor Code: Formatted Media */
;;;761        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 9] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >> 16) & 0xFF;
;;;762        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[10] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >>  8) & 0xFF;
;;;763        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[11] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >>  0) & 0xFF;
;;;764        BulkLen = 12;
000024  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
000026  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24             ;755
000028  7103              STRB     r3,[r0,#4]            ;755
00002a  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16             ;756
00002c  7143              STRB     r3,[r0,#5]            ;756
00002e  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8              ;757
000030  7183              STRB     r3,[r0,#6]            ;757
000032  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]            ;758
000034  2102              MOVS     r1,#2                 ;760
000036  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]            ;760
000038  6911              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x10]         ;761  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00003a  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16             ;761
00003c  7243              STRB     r3,[r0,#9]            ;761
00003e  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8              ;762
000040  7283              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xa]          ;762
000042  72c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xb]          ;763
;;;765    
;;;766        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 12 bytes we have
;;;767           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;768        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000044  480b              LDR      r0,|L22.116|
000046  6314              STR      r4,[r2,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000048  4605              MOV      r5,r0
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
00004e  280c              CMP      r0,#0xc
000050  d908              BLS      |L22.100|
;;;769            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
000052  4908              LDR      r1,|L22.116|
000054  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000056  391f              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x1f
000058  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
00005c  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00005e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;770            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
000060  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
                  |L22.100|
;;;771        }
;;;772    
;;;773        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000064  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L22.104|
;;;774    }
000068  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;775    
                          ENDP

00006a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L22.108|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L22.112|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L22.116|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x27

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_RequestSense||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_RequestSense PROC
;;;507    
;;;508    void USBD_MSC_RequestSense(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;509    {
;;;510        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d02e              BEQ      |L23.104|
;;;511            return;
;;;512        }
;;;513    
;;;514        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x70;             /* Response Code */
00000a  481b              LDR      r0,|L23.120|
00000c  2170              MOVS     r1,#0x70
00000e  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;515        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;516    
;;;517        if ((USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx ^ USBD_MSC_MediaReady) & USBD_MSC_MediaReady) {  /* If media state changed to ready */
000012  4b1a              LDR      r3,|L23.124|
000014  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]            ;515
000016  685a              LDR      r2,[r3,#4]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReady
000018  68dd              LDR      r5,[r3,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx
00001a  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00001c  43ac              BICS     r4,r4,r5
00001e  d006              BEQ      |L23.46|
;;;518            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x06;           /* UNIT ATTENTION */
000020  2406              MOVS     r4,#6
000022  7084              STRB     r4,[r0,#2]
;;;519            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x28;           /* Additional Sense Code: Not ready to ready transition */
000024  2428              MOVS     r4,#0x28
000026  7304              STRB     r4,[r0,#0xc]
;;;520            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;           /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
000028  7341              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xd]
;;;521            USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx = USBD_MSC_MediaReady;
00002a  60da              STR      r2,[r3,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx
00002c  e00a              B        |L23.68|
                  |L23.46|
;;;522        } else if (!USBD_MSC_MediaReady) {
00002e  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000030  d01b              BEQ      |L23.106|
;;;523            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x02;           /* NOT READY */
;;;524            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x3A;           /* Additional Sense Code: Medium not present */
;;;525            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;           /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;526        } else {
;;;527            if (USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus == CSW_CMD_PASSED) {
000032  4a13              LDR      r2,|L23.128|
000034  7b12              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000036  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000038  d01b              BEQ      |L23.114|
;;;528                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;         /* NO SENSE */
;;;529                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code: No additional code */
;;;530                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;531            } else {
;;;532                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x05;         /* ILLEGAL REQUEST */
00003a  2205              MOVS     r2,#5
00003c  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]
;;;533                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x20;         /* Additional Sense Code: Invalid command */
00003e  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
                  |L23.64|
000040  7302              STRB     r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;524
                  |L23.66|
000042  7341              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xd]          ;530
                  |L23.68|
;;;534                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;535            }
;;;536        }
;;;537    
;;;538        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x00;
000044  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]
;;;539        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 0x00;
000046  7101              STRB     r1,[r0,#4]
;;;540        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;
000048  7141              STRB     r1,[r0,#5]
;;;541        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
00004a  7181              STRB     r1,[r0,#6]
;;;542        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x0A;             /* Additional Length */
00004c  220a              MOVS     r2,#0xa
00004e  71c2              STRB     r2,[r0,#7]
;;;543        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 8] = 0x00;
000050  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
;;;544        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 9] = 0x00;
000052  7241              STRB     r1,[r0,#9]
;;;545        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[10] = 0x00;
000054  7281              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xa]
;;;546        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[11] = 0x00;
000056  72c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xb]
;;;547        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[14] = 0x00;
000058  7381              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xe]
;;;548        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[15] = 0x00;
00005a  73c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xf]
;;;549        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[16] = 0x00;
00005c  7401              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x10]
;;;550        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[17] = 0x00;
00005e  7441              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x11]
;;;551        BulkLen = 18;
000060  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
;;;552        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000062  6318              STR      r0,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000064  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L23.104|
;;;553    }
000068  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L23.106|
00006a  2202              MOVS     r2,#2                 ;523
00006c  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]            ;523
00006e  223a              MOVS     r2,#0x3a              ;524
000070  e7e6              B        |L23.64|
                  |L23.114|
000072  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]            ;528
000074  7301              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;529
000076  e7e4              B        |L23.66|
;;;554    
                          ENDP

                  |L23.120|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L23.124|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L23.128|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Reset||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_Reset PROC
;;;115    
;;;116    BOOL USBD_MSC_Reset(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;117    {
;;;118        USBD_EndPointStall = 0x00000000;         /* EP must stay stalled */
000002  4905              LDR      r1,|L24.24|
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;119        USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature = 0;             /* invalid signature */
000006  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointStall
000008  4904              LDR      r1,|L24.28|
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;120        BulkStage = MSC_BS_RESET;
00000e  4904              LDR      r1,|L24.32|
000010  2007              MOVS     r0,#7
000012  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;121        return (__TRUE);
000014  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;122    }
000016  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;123    
                          ENDP

                  |L24.24|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointStall
                  |L24.28|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L24.32|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Reset_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  USBD_MSC_Reset_Event PROC
;;;1116   
;;;1117   void USBD_MSC_Reset_Event(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1118   {
;;;1119       USBD_MSC_Reset();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_Reset
;;;1120   }
000006  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1121   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16 PROC
;;;827    
;;;828    void USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;829    {
;;;830        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d01d              BEQ      |L26.70|
;;;831            return;
;;;832        }
;;;833    
;;;834        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x20;
00000a  480f              LDR      r0,|L26.72|
00000c  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
00000e  7002              STRB     r2,[r0,#0]
;;;835        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000012  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]
;;;836        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[31] = 0x00;
000014  77c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x1f]
;;;837        BulkLen = 32;
000016  4c0d              LDR      r4,|L26.76|
;;;838        BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
000018  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00001a  6322              STR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00001c  7020              STRB     r0,[r4,#0]
;;;839        USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, BulkLen);
00001e  480c              LDR      r0,|L26.80|
000020  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000022  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000024  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000026  4908              LDR      r1,|L26.72|
000028  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;840        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00002c  4809              LDR      r0,|L26.84|
00002e  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000030  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
000034  6b21              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000036  1a40              SUBS     r0,r0,r1
000038  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;841        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
00003e  4905              LDR      r1,|L26.84|
000040  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000042  3908              SUBS     r1,r1,#8
000044  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
                  |L26.70|
;;;842    }
000046  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;843    
                          ENDP

                  |L26.72|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L26.76|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L26.80|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L26.84|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x27

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SetCSW||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SetCSW PROC
;;;1008   
;;;1009   void USBD_MSC_SetCSW(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1010   {
;;;1011       USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature = MSC_CSW_Signature;
000002  4908              LDR      r1,|L27.36|
000004  4808              LDR      r0,|L27.40|
000006  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uwrite4
;;;1012       USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, (U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CSW, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CSW));
00000a  4808              LDR      r0,|L27.44|
00000c  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
00000e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000010  220d              MOVS     r2,#0xd
000012  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000014  4903              LDR      r1,|L27.36|
000016  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;1013       BulkStage = MSC_BS_CSW;
00001a  4905              LDR      r1,|L27.48|
00001c  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
00001e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1014   }
000020  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1015   
                          ENDP

000022  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L27.36|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L27.40|
                          DCD      0x53425355
                  |L27.44|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L27.48|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SetStallEP||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SetStallEP PROC
;;;78     
;;;79     void USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(U32 EPNum)        /* set EP halt status according stall status */
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;80     {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;81         USBD_SetStallEP(EPNum);
000004  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_SetStallEP
;;;82         USBD_EndPointHalt  |= (EPNum & 0x80) ? ((1 << 16) << (EPNum & 0x0F)) : (1 << EPNum);
000008  0620              LSLS     r0,r4,#24
00000a  d505              BPL      |L28.24|
00000c  0721              LSLS     r1,r4,#28
00000e  0f09              LSRS     r1,r1,#28
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000012  0400              LSLS     r0,r0,#16
000014  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1
000016  e001              B        |L28.28|
                  |L28.24|
000018  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00001a  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
                  |L28.28|
00001c  4902              LDR      r1,|L28.40|
00001e  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
000020  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000022  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
;;;83     }
000024  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;84     
                          ENDP

000026  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L28.40|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointHalt

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit PROC
;;;599    
;;;600    void USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;601    {
;;;602        if (!USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[3]) {               /* If power condition modifier is 0 */
000002  480a              LDR      r0,|L29.44|
000004  7c81              LDRB     r1,[r0,#0x12]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
;;;603            USBD_MSC_MediaReady  = USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] & 0x01;   /* Media ready = START bit value */
;;;604            usbd_msc_start_stop(USBD_MSC_MediaReady);
;;;605            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED; /* Start Stop Unit -> pass */
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000008  341f              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x1f
00000a  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;602
00000c  d004              BEQ      |L29.24|
;;;606            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;607            return;
;;;608        }
;;;609    
;;;610        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;   /* Start Stop Unit -> fail */
00000e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L29.16|
000010  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;611        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000012  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;612    }
000016  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L29.24|
000018  7cc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x13]         ;603  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00001a  4905              LDR      r1,|L29.48|
00001c  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31             ;603
00001e  0fc0              LSRS     r0,r0,#31             ;603
000020  6048              STR      r0,[r1,#4]            ;604  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReady
000022  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_start_stop
000026  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;605
000028  e7f2              B        |L29.16|
;;;613    
                          ENDP

00002a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L29.44|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L29.48|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache PROC
;;;782    
;;;783    void USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;784    {
;;;785        /* Synchronize check always passes as we always write data dirrectly
;;;786           so cache is always synchronized                                          */
;;;787        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000002  4903              LDR      r1,|L30.16|
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000006  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;788        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000008  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;789    }
00000c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;790    
                          ENDP

00000e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L30.16|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady PROC
;;;478    
;;;479    void USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;480    {
;;;481        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength != 0) {
000002  4810              LDR      r0,|L31.68|
000004  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uread4
;;;482            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {
;;;483                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;484            } else {
;;;485                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;486            }
;;;487    
;;;488            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
000008  4c0e              LDR      r4,|L31.68|
00000a  3417              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x17
00000c  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;481
00000e  d00f              BEQ      |L31.48|
000010  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;482
000012  381f              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x1f           ;482
000014  7b00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xc]          ;482  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000016  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24             ;482
000018  d504              BPL      |L31.36|
00001a  480b              LDR      r0,|L31.72|
00001c  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80              ;483
00001e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;483  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000020  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;483
000022  e001              B        |L31.40|
                  |L31.36|
000024  4809              LDR      r0,|L31.76|
000026  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;485  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L31.40|
000028  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00002c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;489            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;490            return;
00002e  e004              B        |L31.58|
                  |L31.48|
;;;491        }
;;;492    
;;;493        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000030  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000034  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000036  d003              BEQ      |L31.64|
;;;494            return;
;;;495        }
;;;496    
;;;497        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000038  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L31.58|
00003a  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;498        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L31.64|
;;;499    }
000040  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;500    
                          ENDP

000042  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L31.68|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x8
                  |L31.72|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L31.76|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout

                          AREA ||i.usbd_msc_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1
